title: Oral Health Service Access And Dental Workforce Gaps In Low-Income Countries
summary: Build a verified workflow for measuring oral health service access and dental workforce gaps in low-income countries, linking WHO oral health data and workforce registries.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for measuring oral health service access and dental workforce gaps in low-income countries, linking WHO oral health data and workforce registries.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.
